response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile engineer with genuine tooling and IDE-adjacent experience (he wrote C/C++ components for National Instruments' LabWindows/CVI IDE) and a deep testing/craftsmanship culture. However, this role centers on Java, Kotlin, and the Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate JVM ecosystem, and his profile shows almost none of that: no Kotlin, no Spring, no recent or substantial JVM work. His core stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. The fundamental required qualifications are largely unmet, so despite his quality as an engineer he is not a fit for this specific position.
strengths: Genuine IDE internals experience (C/C++ work on National Instruments' LabWindows/CVI IDE) and developer-tooling focus
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, plus authored test libraries and a custom test runner
Excellent communication and knowledge-sharing track record (conference talks, multi-module courses, workshops)
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, which are core requirements
Limited and dated Java exposure; deep JVM understanding is not evidenced
Primary expertise is in JS/TypeScript and DLang web/backend work, not enterprise JVM ecosystems
